query:
INSERT INTO chart_transaction (
                waypoint_symbol,
                ship_symbol,
                total_price,
                "timestamp"
              )
              VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4)
              ON CONFLICT (waypoint_symbol) DO UPDATE SET
                ship_symbol = EXCLUDED.ship_symbol,
                total_price = EXCLUDED.total_price,
                "timestamp" = EXCLUDED."timestamp"
              RETURNING id
